name: Unwrap terminal command
description: Detects terminal-copied, soft-wrapped text and joins it back into one line.

providers.name: Terminal source
providers.description: Matches when the text was copied from a known terminal (Terminal, iTerm2, Warp, kitty, Ghostty, VS Code, and more).

providers.name: Soft-wrapped text
providers.description: Matches fixed-width line wraps: every line but the last shares length L >= 40 and the last is shorter.

providers.name: Unwrap (join wrapped lines)
providers.description: Joins soft-wrapped terminal output into one line: deletes wrap newlines, else collapses each newline run to one space.
